APPEARANCES: Atty. STEPHEN F. HENRY, ESQ., Tel No. 510-898-1883 appearing for the Plaintiff;

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDDIE VALADEZ'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant failed to maintain his burden of production. Defendant's separate statement of undisputed facts does not clearly highlight the defamatory statement/s. Without such identification, the court cannot determine whether the common interest privilege applies. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H.
